summary: The diff addresses all three requirements to varying degrees. REQ-26 is well-covered with URL-path-based mode detection in App.tsx and a multi-step access guard in AdminPanel.tsx. REQ-27 is implemented via an Admin Panel shortcut button in AccountView.tsx (visible only to admin-role users). REQ-28 frontend guard is fixed, but no backend changes are visible in the diff to address admin role assignment, bootstrapping, or a backend endpoint for verifying/assigning admin roles.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend exposes a way to assign or verify admin role for a given principal, and if no admin exists, the backend allows an initial admin bootstrap (e.g., first caller or a hardcoded principal is granted admin role).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains only frontend file changes (App.tsx, AccountView.tsx, AdminPanel.tsx, useQueries.ts). No backend files are modified or added. The backend-side role assignment, admin verification endpoint, and initial admin bootstrap logic are not present in any diff entry.
